description_long: This is a military jet aircraft with a sleek, angular fuselage and sharply swept-back wings, painted in a matte gray-blue color. The wings are mid-mounted and feature prominent hardpoints carrying missiles or external fuel tanks. The aircraft has twin vertical stabilizers at the rear, angled outward, and a pair of large jet engine exhausts visible at the back. Red star insignias are present on the wings and fuselage, indicating a likely Russian or Soviet origin. The nose is sharply pointed, and the cockpit is positioned forward with a dark, enclosed canopy. The landing gear is partially deployed, with the main gear visible beneath the fuselage.
description: A gray-blue military jet with swept-back mid-mounted wings, twin vertical stabilizers, and external missiles, featuring red star insignias and a pointed nose.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the pointed nose, forward cockpit, swept wings with missiles, and twin vertical stabilizers.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlighting the twin engine exhausts, angled vertical stabilizers, and wing-mounted missiles.
description_view_2: Rear-right view displaying the star insignias on the wings and fuselage, and the angular tail section.
description_view_3: Front-right view emphasizing the cockpit canopy, nose, and the arrangement of missiles under the wings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with sharply swept wings, no visible winglets, and slight anhedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted at the rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Twin vertical stabilizers with a conventional tailplane, angled outward in an H-tail configuration.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle retractable landing gear with visible main and nose gear units.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single canopy, likely single or tandem seat.
